title: Church-style high-density DNA data storage
note: Foundational demonstration of encoding digital data in DNA; baseline density reference for HelixStore.

title: OpenROAD: Toward a Self-Driving, Open-Source Digital Layout Implementation
note: Open RTL-to-GDS baseline that OpenFlow-X builds around.

title: Eyeriss v2: A Flexible Accelerator for Emerging DNNs
note: Reference dataflow accelerator; comparison point for SparseCore efficiency.

title: Hardware Trojans: Lessons Learned after One Decade of Research
note: Survey grounding the TrustScan threat model and benchmark selection.

title: Universal Chiplet Interconnect Express (UCIe) specification
note: Die-to-die interconnect standard referenced in chiplet partitioning work.
